title: angorkis pusilla
intro: Angorkis pusilla, also known as Dwarf Indian Mulberry or Indian Mulberry, is a small shrub native to tropical regions, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angorkis pusilla include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as being used to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. Angorkis pusilla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
